name: Taiwan Hopax Chems.Mfg.Co.,Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Hopax Chems.Mfg.Co.,Ltd. produces and sells diversified chemical products in the areas of specialty chemicals, fine chemicals, and repositionable self-adhesive products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers papermaking chemicals, including dispersants, carbonless paper chemicals, paper coating chemicals, and wet end chemicals; water treatment chemicals, such as wastewater treating compounds, and chemicals for cooling water and boiler water; and combo packs, paper notes, cubes, line/assorted/pop-up notes, markers/index tabs/flags, clear notes, special and designing notes, and re-stick tape info boards/meeting pads. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
